chats.text: Let me just restate the elephant in the room — we're looking at a real deceleration here. Right?
{NAME}, you and I need to talk about that exit interview you said was 'strategic.' They've got me on the hook for Q3 attainment.
For what it's worth, I was made aware last week that the poster board in the hallway has a hole in it shaped like… this. Right?
{NAME}, do you have five minutes to brainstorm alternate strategies for Feb? The burn rate is out of control.
My calendar said I had a 'strategic pivot' with the client at 2PM. My bad — they ran late on the deck.
Ryan, heard you're planning a 'deceleration sprint.' Should I…?
quick update for everyone: I'm going to step out for a minute. The quarterly review deck just came in and we need to align on the 'attainment shortfall' terminology right?
noted — I was made aware of the deck's delivery schedule and can pull any needed bandwidth during my coffee break if that's useful
let's table the terminology debate for now — we need to focus on eliminating blockers and pulling forward low-hanging proof right?
hey — Ryan just pinged me in a DM asking if I 'see the downstream implications' of the last minute meeting. like, what implications?? i'm not even on payroll yet
{NAME}, do you have any bandwidth to look at the velocity corridor report? charles was made aware that we might need it for the 'shrinkage analysis' later
{NAME} — I've been made aware that there's a potential performance gap we need to address. can you help me think through alternative strategies? right?
hey Ryan — your absence last week really affected our team time prevalence, right? we've been operating at a historic deficit on the golf cadence
Ryan — I was made aware of your potential downstream applications, right? I've been tracking the velocity corridor for you and thought it might be useful
Charles — I've been made aware that you're the lead on this. can we focus on tangibles and eliminate blockers for your Q3 attainment right?
Charles — I've been tracking the team time prevalence and wanted to touch base on what's needed for the 'shrinkage analysis' right?
Braxton — I've been made aware of the multi velocity corridor. can you pull forward any low-hanging proof for me? right?
hey Braxton — I've been made aware that you're the new hire. i wanted to check if you saw my golf cadence update right?
Braxton — I've been made aware that you're new. can we focus on eliminating blockers for your first month? right?
quick update: I'll be late to the next session — the Q3 attainment review deck just came in and we need to align on terminology right?
noted for my records: charles's late arrival is part of the 'team time prevalence' analysis we've been tracking
before we adjourn for the quarter-end close I think it’s important to note that there’s no downstream impact from missing this one.
{NAME} can you loop me on who’s covering the deck prep when Ryan pushes off after 2pm?
he said there was no downstream impact but it feels like he just said that.
Ryan — you’re good with the Feb 28 blackout? We’re looking at a 30% attainment shortfall if we don’t close today.
Charles — I was made aware that the velocity corridor is posterior but I’ve historically speaking accepted the downstream deceleration as a known headwind.
is anyone else just vibing with this? because I am. and i will be forever.
Braxton — you’re good on the low-hanging proof tangibles? We need them reflected in Q3 performance, right?
Charles — I was made aware that all my bandwidth is tied to the shrinkage aperture. Let’s just say I’m pulling forward.
anyone else see where the finish line might be? i think we’re still in multi-velocity.
{NAME} — if you don’t want to cover deck prep just tell me and I’ll loop someone else. but like, now?
okay so let’s all be real: we’re at the posterior edge of the aperture and nothing is materializing today.
Braxton — I was made aware that you said nothing for me on your pardon but can you restate that in performance terms?
anyone got a tangibilized blocker they want to pull forward? or we just riding this decay?
Ryan — I’m good on the fire. and also the nothing for me part. i think we’re at month end close.
i appreciate you all showing up for this last day of February even though nothing materializes today. let’s circle back after the quarter-end blackout.
Team time prevalence is looking tight today. Do we all need to stay for this?
Hey. Ryan's absence is being used as a wedge. You know how he does.
You're the only one who gets to call it 'absence', right? What about mine?
The multi velocity corridor has no natural endpoints, but we can still work with this aperture.
I was made aware that you're actually three hours late. Want me to set up your chair?
Anything reflected in February needs to materialize today. The finish line is a delta.
You're the only one who gets to say that without it sounding like you're reading from a spreadsheet, right?
Is there an alternative strategy where we functionally push February to March? No. That's fire.
I was made aware of your salary adjustment last week. Want me to put that on the agenda?
We are effectively at month end close. The shrinkage is real.
Your 'historically speaking' bit was historically irrelevant. Don't bring it up again today, right?
Anything we want reflected in February needs to materialize today.
You're the only intern who gets to say that and not have it look like you're quoting me, right?
Go ahead. I'll be back in five.
